fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally. Specifies the line number of the comment.
When you create a comment, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the Inter. Log Entry Comment Line table. The line number is unique for the specific comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the comment.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment itself. You can enter a maximum of 80 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date on which the comment was last modified.
When you change information in the Inter. Log Entry Comment Line table, the program automatically updates the Last Date Modified field.
